close_reason: Commit proxy now passes epoch to sequencer for next_commit_version and report_successful_commit calls.
description:
Update commit proxy to include epoch in all sequencer calls:

1. get_commit_version - pass epoch from proxy state
2. report_successful_commit - pass epoch from proxy state

Proxy already has epoch at boot (part of minimal config). This change makes it pass the epoch through to sequencer.

Depends on: bedrock-p2d0 (sequencer must accept epoch first)
title: Commit proxy sends epoch with sequencer requests
